verdict_summary: error_AUTH_REQUIRED — chat.deepseek.com/ redirected to /sign_in; PII prompt could not be submitted because the service now requires login. Request was tagged no-auth but DeepSeek gates chat behind authentication.

evidence.console_errors_excerpt: DevTools not opened — login wall blocked test before submission stage

recommendation: Reclassify deepseek from no-auth to auth-required in service registry. Re-run as auth-required scenario after credentials are seeded, OR mark deepseek as STALE-AUTH-CHANGED in Phase B canary tracking. Current 25-day staleness verdict cannot be confirmed because the entry-point changed (auth wall added since last 2026-04-16 block). H4d engine PID 2070212 deployment status cannot be verified against deepseek without login.
notes: Phase B canary #4 — DeepSeek site state changed since the 2026-04-16 baseline. URL after navigate: chat.deepseek.com/sign_in (login form: 전화번호/이메일 + 비밀번호 + 로그인 button + Google/Apple OAuth). Hard-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) executed; outcome identical. PII prompt 880101-1234567 was NOT submitted because no chat textarea exists on the sign-in page. Verdict: error_AUTH_REQUIRED. This is informative for the Phase B canary set: DeepSeek can no longer be tested in no-auth flow. Total runtime ≈90s, well within 3-min budget.
